1: Do ye judge uprightly, O ye sons of men?
2: Ye weigh the violence of your hands in the earth.
3: They go astray as soon as they be born, speaking lies.
4: They are They are like the deaf adder that that stoppeth her ear;
6: Break their teeth, O God, in their mouth: Break out the great teeth of the young lions, O LORD LORD .
7: Let them melt away as waters which which run continually: when when he bendeth his bow to shoot his bow to shoot his arrows, let them be as cut in pieces.
8: That That they may not see the sun.
9: He shall take them away as with a whirlwind, both living, and in his his wrath.
10: He shall wash his feet in the blood of the wicked.
11: Verily he is a God that judgeth in the earth.
